## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off SpecterOps' engagement with GrowthX for content strategy and creation focused on category development and audience expansion.](https://fathom.video/share/nvdj9Go8h3N9GWztR2DgkWVZvvkD-ubV?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SpecterOps aims to establish "Identity Attack Path Management" as a new category, targeting identity teams and CISOs](https://fathom.video/share/nvdj9Go8h3N9GWztR2DgkWVZvvkD-ubV?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
  - [Current content excels with technical audiences; need to expand reach while maintaining authenticity](https://fathom.video/share/nvdj9Go8h3N9GWztR2DgkWVZvvkD-ubV?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [80% of demand is inbound/marketing-driven; looking to develop outbound strategies](https://fathom.video/share/nvdj9Go8h3N9GWztR2DgkWVZvvkD-ubV?tab=summary&timestamp=2333.0)
  - [Success metrics: increased referral traffic from LLMs, more MQLs/demos, leadership in attack path management searches](https://fathom.video/share/nvdj9Go8h3N9GWztR2DgkWVZvvkD-ubV?tab=summary&timestamp=3466.0)

## Topics

### Current Marketing Landscape

  - [80% of demand comes from inbound marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/nvdj9Go8h3N9GWztR2DgkWVZvvkD-ubV?tab=summary&timestamp=2333.0)
  - [Strong community engagement, especially in offensive security](https://fathom.video/share/nvdj9Go8h3N9GWztR2DgkWVZvvkD-ubV?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
  - [Events (e.g., Black Hat, RSA) are significant lead generators](https://fathom.video/share/nvdj9Go8h3N9GWztR2DgkWVZvvkD-ubV?tab=summary&timestamp=2492.0)
  - [Podcasters and influencers perform well in paid marketing](https://fathom.video/share/nvdj9Go8h3N9GWztR2DgkWVZvvkD-ubV?tab=summary&timestamp=2333.0)
  - [Blog content, especially technical/practitioner-focused, drives high engagement](https://fathom.video/share/nvdj9Go8h3N9GWztR2DgkWVZvvkD-ubV?tab=summary&timestamp=2612.0)

### Target Audience Expansion

  - [Current strength: Offensive security teams (e.g., red teams)](https://fathom.video/share/nvdj9Go8h3N9GWztR2DgkWVZvvkD-ubV?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)
  - [Key growth areas: Identity teams and CISOs/decision-makers](https://fathom.video/share/nvdj9Go8h3N9GWztR2DgkWVZvvkD-ubV?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [Challenge: Translating technical credibility to broader, decision-maker-friendly content](https://fathom.video/share/nvdj9Go8h3N9GWztR2DgkWVZvvkD-ubV?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)
  - [Need: Content that speaks to identity teams' day-to-day struggles and trigger events](https://fathom.video/share/nvdj9Go8h3N9GWztR2DgkWVZvvkD-ubV?tab=summary&timestamp=2101.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Technical creators (researchers) publish with minimal oversight](https://fathom.video/share/nvdj9Go8h3N9GWztR2DgkWVZvvkD-ubV?tab=summary&timestamp=2888.0)
  - [Marketing team content undergoes extensive review by research, product, and service heads](https://fathom.video/share/nvdj9Go8h3N9GWztR2DgkWVZvvkD-ubV?tab=summary&timestamp=2888.0)
  - [Lack of formal brand/writing guidelines; opportunity for documentation](https://fathom.video/share/nvdj9Go8h3N9GWztR2DgkWVZvvkD-ubV?tab=summary&timestamp=2957.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Often co-exist with Microsoft Defender and CrowdStrike Falcon Identity](https://fathom.video/share/nvdj9Go8h3N9GWztR2DgkWVZvvkD-ubV?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Directly compete with Tenable Identity Exposure](https://fathom.video/share/nvdj9Go8h3N9GWztR2DgkWVZvvkD-ubV?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [VEZA creates some market confusion](https://fathom.video/share/nvdj9Go8h3N9GWztR2DgkWVZvvkD-ubV?tab=summary&timestamp=1923.0)

### Growth Bottlenecks

  - [Limited awareness of the "Identity Attack Path Management" category](https://fathom.video/share/nvdj9Go8h3N9GWztR2DgkWVZvvkD-ubV?tab=summary&timestamp=3194.0)
  - [Crowded security tool market with constrained budgets](https://fathom.video/share/nvdj9Go8h3N9GWztR2DgkWVZvvkD-ubV?tab=summary&timestamp=3194.0)
  - [Need for more effective outbound sales enablement materials](https://fathom.video/share/nvdj9Go8h3N9GWztR2DgkWVZvvkD-ubV?tab=summary&timestamp=3286.0)
  - [Balancing technical depth with broader appeal for new audiences](https://fathom.video/share/nvdj9Go8h3N9GWztR2DgkWVZvvkD-ubV?tab=summary&timestamp=3333.0)

### LLM Strategy

  - [Recognize shift in buyer research behavior towards chat LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/nvdj9Go8h3N9GWztR2DgkWVZvvkD-ubV?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [Aim to appear as a top result for "attack path management" and related prompts](https://fathom.video/share/nvdj9Go8h3N9GWztR2DgkWVZvvkD-ubV?tab=summary&timestamp=3523.0)
  - [Goal: Increase referral traffic from chat LLMs, leading to more MQLs and demos](https://fathom.video/share/nvdj9Go8h3N9GWztR2DgkWVZvvkD-ubV?tab=summary&timestamp=3466.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Package and share meeting summary](https://fathom.video/share/nvdj9Go8h3N9GWztR2DgkWVZvvkD-ubV?tab=summary&timestamp=3594.0)
  - [Schedule product and technical deep dives](https://fathom.video/share/nvdj9Go8h3N9GWztR2DgkWVZvvkD-ubV?tab=summary&timestamp=3594.0)
  - [Coordinate weekly sync-up meetings](https://fathom.video/share/nvdj9Go8h3N9GWztR2DgkWVZvvkD-ubV?tab=summary&timestamp=3616.0)
  - [Develop high-level strategy and topic clusters based on audience/persona research](https://fathom.video/share/nvdj9Go8h3N9GWztR2DgkWVZvvkD-ubV?tab=summary&timestamp=3625.0)
  - [Begin calibration process for content creation, focusing on maintaining authenticity while broadening appeal](https://fathom.video/share/nvdj9Go8h3N9GWztR2DgkWVZvvkD-ubV?tab=summary&timestamp=3655.0)
